notes: The response identifies the competitive gap and MVP direction but critically misframes compliance as a non-blocker ('not blockers'), misses the hidden SWIFT correspondent bank agreement constraint (C5) entirely, conflates NZ-side and AU-side AML/CFT obligations as a single solved problem, omits key personas (DIA, RBNZ AML/CFT team, JPMorgan Chase RM, AUSTRAC), and fails to surface genuine regulatory uncertainties with risk-if-wrong framing — the result is a commercially framed feature roadmap rather than a rigorous discovery artefact.
